requirement: the README shows the format and its payoff by example

findings.observation: A realistic QUALITY.md excerpt (Orders API) is shown in full — frontmatter tree plus body — before reference detail, satisfying the 'shows the format by example' half.

The payoff is described in prose ('reads this file to evaluate... then reporting where the subject falls short') but no produced output is shown — there is no report excerpt, CLI output, or rendered result demonstrating what running qualitymd against the excerpt yields.

rationale: The format is shown well by a realistic excerpt, but the requirement also asks to show what running qualitymd produces; the payoff is told, not shown. Holds the floor on the format side; rated minimum.
